_comment: polish-orchestrator — hard guardrails as harness-enforced denies. Bash: block `git push` (the Polisher commits locally only; you review and push yourself) AND outbound send/post commands (gh pr/issue create, git send-email) — polish never auto-sends. Exit 2 blocks the call. Wire this into your project's .claude/settings.json PreToolUse hooks. Windows-correct: node -e one-liners.

hooks.command: node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(s);const c=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.command)||'';if(/git\s+push\b|git\s+remote\s+\S+\s+\S*push|\bpush\s+--/.test(c)){console.error('[polish deny] git push is forbidden — commit locally only; you review and push yourself.');process.exit(2);}if(/\b(gh\s+pr\s+create|gh\s+issue\s+create|git\s+send-email)\b/.test(c)){console.error('[polish deny] outbound publish/send is forbidden — polish drafts only, never auto-sends.');process.exit(2);}}catch(e){}process.exit(0);})"
